opinion.h: UNITED STATES v. DIAMOND, ALIAS DUMANUS, THORNSON AND SLATER, ET AL. ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF CERTIORARI TO THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE NINTH CIRCUIT. No. 771. Decided April 7, 1958.
opinion.p: Solicitor General Rankin, Acting Assistant Attorney General McLean, Beatrice Rosenberg and J. F. Bishop for the United States.
Robert L. Brock for David Diamond, respondent.
The petition for writ of certiorari is granted and the judgment is affirmed.
